name: Jessica Deliverson
short_description: "Jessica Deliverson" is a 3D work simulation game with elements of arcade, runner and time management. You will play as a cute girl-courier Jessica, whose goal is to complete her work on time, even despite the anomalies happening in the city.
detailed_description:
"Jessica Deliverson" is a 3D work simulation game with elements of arcade, runner and time management. You will play as a cute girl-courier Jessica, whose goal is to complete her work on time, even despite the anomalies happening in the city. You'll need a good memory and the ability to build non-obvious routes in a short time, otherwise you won't get paid!

Game features:
-Timely delivery
-Dynamic levels
-3D graphics
